title: astrum.yml app manifest (v1)
description: Declarative app manifest consumed by Astrum.

name.description: App slug. Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens. Must start with a letter. Max 63 chars.

port.description: TCP port the container listens on. Defaults to 8080.

health_check_path.description: HTTP path polled to verify container health. Must start with /. Defaults to /health.

command.description: Optional override for the image's CMD. Null or absent uses the image default.

gh_environment.description: Optional. Names a GitHub Environment whose env-scoped secrets and variables overlay org/repo-level ones during sync. The calling workflow is expected to read this and set environment: on the sync job so its protection rules apply. When omitted, the sync runs without any GH Environment binding and only org/repo-level values are visible.

secrets.description: Names of GitHub env-scoped secrets to sync. Values are fetched fresh from GH at sync time — never inline in the manifest.

variables.description: Per-environment variables map. Keys are UPPER_SNAKE_CASE env var names. Values are strings; ${NAME} substrings are substituted from GH env-scoped variables, then GH env-scoped secrets, at sync time. Composable: 'https://api-${REGION}.example.com'.
